message:
fix(test): capture stderr in TestWarnHandoffGitStatus (gt-ftl9)

warnHandoffGitStatus uses style.PrintWarning which writes to stderr,
but the test captureStdout helper only captures os.Stdout. Add a
captureOutput helper that captures both streams and use it in the two
failing subtests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
